else if a[0] >= c[0] then\n    Max(1 + MaxPurchases(c[1..], a[1..]), MaxPurchases(c[1..], a))\n  else\n    MaxPurchases(c[1..], a)\n}\n\n// MaxPurchases is bounded by both sequence lengths and is ExtraBillBounded(c: seq<int>, a: seq<int>)\n  requires |a| > 0\n  ensures MaxPurchases(c, a) <= MaxPurchases(c, a[1..]) + 1\n  decreases |c|\n{\n  if |c| == 0 {\n  } else {\n invariant 0 <= i <= |c|\n    invariant 0 <= j <= |a|\n    invariant count >= 0\n    invariant count + MaxPurchases(c[i..], a[j..]) == MaxPurchases(c, a)\n  {\n    if a[j] >= c[i] {\n
